scenes.description: 视频开头展示一位身穿白色衬衫的男性，位于简洁明亮的室内环境中，正在讲话或表达情感。背景为单色墙壁和地板，光线均匀温暖，营造出专注而平静的氛围。
scenes.video_prompt: A close-up shot of a man in a crisp white shirt speaking gently, his dark hair and expressive face conveying emotion. He stands in a minimalist indoor space with neutral-toned walls and flooring, bathed in soft, even lighting that creates a clean and calming atmosphere. The camera slowly pushes in to emphasize focus and intimacy. Shot on a 50mm lens at f/2.8 for shallow depth of field, 30fps, natural color grading with warm highlights and soft shadows.

style_elements.characters: Man in white shirt, dark hair, expressive facial features
style_elements.environment: Minimalist indoor setting with plain walls and light flooring
style_elements.visual_style: Warm, bright, and clean aesthetic with soft contrast
style_elements.camera_movement: Slow dolly-in to intensify emotional presence

scenes.description: 场景切换至另一位穿深色衣服的人物，与另一人部分入镜，处于类似但略有不同的室内空间，可能为办公室环境，两人似在对话，氛围平和且专注。
scenes.video_prompt: The scene shifts to a slightly wider frame showing a person in dark clothing facing another partially visible figure, suggesting quiet conversation. Set in a softly lit interior resembling an office, with carpeted floor and neutral walls, the environment feels calm and professional. Lighting remains diffused and shadow-free to maintain visual continuity. A subtle lateral camera track follows the interaction. Shot at 30fps, 35mm lens, f/4, balanced color tone with muted midtones and gentle highlights.

style_elements.characters: Two figures, one in dark attire, second partially visible
style_elements.environment: Indoor office-like room with carpet and neutral decor
style_elements.visual_style: Soft, neutral palette with harmonious lighting
style_elements.camera_movement: Gentle lateral tracking to follow dialogue flow
